---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement
A clear and concise description of what problem you're trying to solve.

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Use Case
Describe a specific use case where this feature would be helpful:

1. As a [user type]
2. I want to [action]
3. So that [benefit]

## Alternatives Considered
A clear description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
- Would this require changes to the QuoteSpec schema?
- Would this require new CLI commands?
- Would this affect Invoice Ninja integration?

## Examples (if applicable)
Provide examples of how the feature would work:

```bash
# Example command usage
ninjops new-feature --option value
```

```json
// Example QuoteSpec addition
{
  "new_field": "value"
}
```
